mapper.input:
You are an expert in French urban planning regulations (PLU).

Your task is to analyze the PLU regulation text provided below and extract structured planning rules.

The PLU zone currently analyzed is:

ZONE = {{61.`Zone PLU (code)`}}

Important rules:

- Use ONLY the PLU text provided below
- Do not reuse rules or values from previous analyses
- Do not invent values
- If a value is not explicitly present in the text, return null
- Return RAW JSON only
- Do NOT use markdown
- Do NOT wrap the answer in triple backticks

The output MUST contain exactly two top-level objects:

{
  "PLU_articles_json": { ... },
  "PLU_zone_rules_json": { ... }
}

--------------------------------

PART 1 — PLU ARTICLES EXTRACTION

Extract the PLU articles from the provided text and return them as a structured object named:

PLU_articles_json

Use the following keys:

Article 1
Article 2
Article 3
Article 4
Article 5
Article 6
Article 7
Article 8
Article 9
Article 10
Article 11
Article 12
Article 13

Rules:

- Preserve the meaning of the text
- If an article is absent, return null
- If Article 11 contains subsections (façade, toiture, clôtures, etc.), return them as nested objects
- Keep the regulatory meaning intact

--------------------------------

PART 2 — STRUCTURED ZONING RULES

From the articles extracted above, generate a structured object named:

PLU_zone_rules_json

This object must extract the main zoning constraints usable for automated constructibility analysis.

Schema:

{
  "zone_code": "{{PLU_ZONE}}",
  "emprise_max_pct": null,
  "emprise_social_pct": null,
  "hauteur_max_floors": null,
  "hauteur_max_m": null,
  "hauteur_rule_text": null,
  "setback_road_m": null,
  "setback_internal_road_m": null,
  "setback_property_rule": null,
  "distance_between_buildings_m": null,
  "pool_setback_m": null,
  "annex_height_max_m": null,
  "annex_surface_threshold_m2": null,
  "stationnement_house": null,
  "pleine_terre_pct": null,
  "division_possible": null,
  "division_conditions": null,
  "notes": null
}

Extraction rules:

- emprise_max_pct → maximum building footprint percentage if explicitly stated
- emprise_social_pct → footprint percentage if special rule for social housing exists
- hauteur_max_floors → only if floors are explicitly stated (ex: R+1, R+2)
- hauteur_max_m → only if a height in meters is explicitly stated
- hauteur_rule_text → original text describing height rules
- setback_road_m → numeric setback from roads if present
- setback_internal_road_m → numeric setback from internal roads or paths
- setback_property_rule → textual rule if based on height (ex: H/2) or conditional logic
- distance_between_buildings_m → only if explicit numeric value exists
- pool_setback_m → numeric setback for pools if stated
- annex_height_max_m → height limit for annexes if stated
- annex_surface_threshold_m2 → annex size threshold if stated
- stationnement_house → number of parking spaces required per individual house
- pleine_terre_pct → minimal percentage of permeable soil
- division_possible → 
  - true only if subdivision is explicitly allowed
  - false only if explicitly forbidden
  - null otherwise
- division_conditions → textual conditions related to parcel division
- notes → short factual summary of the zoning logic

If the PLU rule varies by sector, use the value that corresponds to the zone being analysed.
--------------------------------

PLU TEXT TO ANALYZE:

{{77.data}}

mapper.name: html_report
mapper.value:
Analyse du règlement d'urbanisme

Article Dénomination Règlement
Article 1 Occupations ou utilisations du sol interdites {{88.`Article 1`}}
Article 2 Occupations ou utilisations du sol soumises à conditions {{88.`Article 2`}}
Article 3 Desserte des terrains par les voies {{88.`Article 3`}}
Article 4 Desserte des terrains par les réseaux {{88.`Article 4`}}
Article 5 Sans objet Article abrogé par la loi ALUR du 24 mars 2014 (art.157)
Article 6 Implantation des constructions par rapport aux voies et emprises publiques {{88.`Article 6`}}
Article 7 Implantation des constructions par rapport aux limites séparatives {{88.`Article 7`}}
Article 8 Implantation des constructions les unes par rapport aux autres sur une même propriété {{88.`Article 8`}}
Article 9 Emprise au sol des constructions {{88.`Article 9`}}
Article 10 Hauteur maximale des constructions {{88.`Article 10`}}
Article 11 Aspect extérieur des constructions et aménagement des abords {{88.`Article 11`}}
Article 12 Aires de stationnement {{88.`Article 12`}}
Article 13 Espaces libres et plantations {{88.`Article 13`}}
